execution_run.what happened: Added roadmap-lane support to promote-to-plan, routed compact summary/readiness guidance to that command, made archive cleanup remove active work_items that point at archived execplans, surfaced dogfooding/self-optimisation as a standing workflow obligation, and removed compact roadmap candidate fallback noise.

execution_run.changed surfaces: planning package, workspace CLI, repo workflow docs/config, planning state and closeout artifact

durable_residue.learned constraint: Dogfooding evaluation and actionable self-optimisation findings must be surfaced without waiting for explicit user instruction.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The package is its own operating surface; workflow friction found during lane execution should become either an in-scope fix or an explicit routed item.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: when agents complete a lane or encounter actionable safety, cost, or efficiency friction during implementation

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice and larger intent are both complete.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: None unless new evidence shows the bounded closure was incomplete.

signals found: Safer: active lane promotion should use a command/scaffold instead of hand-authoring state.toml.
Cheaper: archive cleanup should remove active work_items references the same way it removes active execplan/TODO residue.
More efficient: closeout templates should expose terminal values up front.
Required workflow: dogfooding/self-optimisation should run without explicit instruction.
Efficiency: compact summary should not populate roadmap.candidates from roadmap lanes when no explicit candidates exist.
signals fixed: promote-to-plan can promote roadmap IDs and compact recommendations point agents to the command.
archive cleanup removes active work_items references for archived execplans.
closeout templates expose terminal values from the prior lane.
workflow config and preflight surface self-optimisation as a standing closeout obligation.
compact planning summary keeps roadmap candidate_lanes separate from explicit candidates.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.

config_check.summary: workflow_obligations.dogfooding_lane_closeout now requires dogfooding/self-optimisation without explicit instruction.

docs.summary: .agentic-workspace/WORKFLOW.md now makes self-optimisation a standing implementation and closeout requirement.
